stories.title: NFCA Week 8 Poll Drops Today — Texas Likely Falls From No. 1

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The NFCA Week 8 poll is out today.

Texas lost Sunday. Florida lost a series to Arkansas. Tennessee struggling.

Meanwhile: Florida State has a 21-game win streak. Oklahoma won at LSU. Nebraska beat UCLA.

The votes will be interesting. 👀

#NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Hot take: Texas should stay No. 1.

They lost ONE game. Won the series 2-1. They're 31-2. They're the defending national champions.

One bad Sunday doesn't erase a season. But coaches are going to shake up this poll.

Who's your No. 1 today? 🥎

#HookEm #NCAASoftball

article.headline: NFCA Week 8 Poll Is Out: Does Texas Stay No. 1 After Sunday's Loss?

stories.title: Lonni Alameda Earns Her 1,000th Career Win at Florida State

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Lonni Alameda just won her 1,000th career game.

18 seasons at FSU. 1,000-388-3 record. 12th active DI coach to hit 1,000.

Her team doused her with Gatorade after the final out.

"I'm just grateful to be part of this game for a long time."

A legend. 🥎

#NoleFamily #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Gatorade Bath and a Thousand Wins: Lonni Alameda Makes History at Florida State

stories.title: Kendall Wells at 26 HRs — Four Away From NCAA Freshman Record

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 26 home runs.

Four away from the NCAA freshman record of 30.

Batting .384. 57 RBI. Zero errors. She's a freshman.

Patty Gasso has coached Alo and Chamberlain. She says Wells is "something new."

The record is in danger. 🥎

#BoomerSooner #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Four Away: Kendall Wells Is Closing in on the NCAA Freshman Home Run Record

stories.title: Maya Johnson Reaches 1,000 Career Strikeouts at Belmont

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Belmont's Maya Johnson: 1,000 career strikeouts.

She turned down hundreds of thousands in NIL money to stay.

Leads the nation with 203 Ks this season.

Started 2026 with a 15-K perfect game. Then upset No. 15 Georgia.

Loyalty. Dominance. Respect. 🥎

#NCAASoftball #Softball

article.headline: She Turned Down the Money. Then She Struck Out 1,000 Batters. Maya Johnson's Story Is College Softball at Its Best.

stories.title: SEC Standings After Week 8 — Texas and Oklahoma Lead at 8-1

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
SEC softball standings after Week 8:

🔺 Texas: 8-1
🔺 Oklahoma: 8-1
📍 Florida: 9-3
📍 Alabama: 6-1 (Texas series starts April 2)

Both Texas and OU at the top. Florida losing ground after two straight series losses to Arkansas.

The race is on. 🥎

#NCAASoftball #SECSoftball

stories.title: Isa Torres Batting .655 — One of the Greatest Offensive Seasons in NCAA History

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Isa Torres: .655 average. .716 on-base percentage.

She set the NCAA record for consecutive hits — 16 in a row.

She is delivering one of the greatest offensive seasons in college softball history.

FSU is 32-4. On a 21-game win streak.

POY. Done. 🥎

#NoleFamily #NCAASoftball

stories.title: Texas at Alabama on April 2 — The Series Everyone Has Been Waiting For

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Mark your calendar. 📅

Texas at Alabama — April 2.

31-2 Texas. 29-2 Alabama. Both top-10. SEC first place at stake.

This is the series we've been waiting for all season.

#HookEm #RollTide #NCAASoftball #SECSoftball
